description: Style NoteCut from soft and stretchy knit cotton fabric, this fashion brief from chromozome epitomises style and comfort. Its elasticated wide waistband offers a snug Fit while printed branding on the inside provides tag-less comfort. Available to you at a price that does not burn a hole in your pocket this piece makes for a great buy.Product DetailsNavy Blue tanga style brief, wide turquoise elasticized waistband for a smooth and comfortable grip, double layered front for extra support and comfort,  features an attractive print at the back, high cut design allows free leg movement, printed branding on the inside offers abrasion-free comfortMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not iron on printSize and FitRegular riseThe model (height 6' and waist 32'') is wearing a size M
